'''Darkknell''' was an astronomical object located in<ref name="TFABG" /> the [[Darkknell system]]<ref name="TR" /> of [[the galaxy]]'s [[Outer Rim Territories]], situated along the [[Hydian Way]] at [[Standard Galactic Grid|grid coordinates]] M-17.<ref name="TFABG" /> The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|Rebel Alliance]] [[intelligence officer]] [[Cassian Jeron Andor]] acted under the alias "Aach" as a [[senator]]ial contact on Darkknell.<ref name="Visual Guide">''[[Star Wars: Rogue One: The Ultimate Visual Guide]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Darkknell was first [[canon]]ically mentioned in the [[StarWars.com]] article "[[Where in the Galaxy Are the Worlds of Star Wars: The Force Awakens?|Where in the Galaxy Are the Worlds of ''Star Wars: The Force Awakens''?]]," which was written by [[Mark Newbold]] and published on [[January 29]], [[2016]].<ref name="Worlds of TFA">{{SW|url=news/where-in-the-galaxy-are-the-worlds-of-star-wars-the-force-awakens|text=Where in the Galaxy Are the Worlds of ''Star Wars: The Force Awakens''?|int=Where in the Galaxy Are the Worlds of Star Wars: The Force Awakens?}}</ref> In the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity, the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Darkknell/Legends|Darkknell]] first appeared in the novella ''[[Interlude at Darkknell]]'' by [[Timothy Zahn]] and [[Michael A. Stackpole]], which was published in the [[1999]] anthology ''[[Tales from the New Republic]]''.<ref name="Interlude">{{StoryCite|story=Interlude at Darkknell|book=Tales from the New Republic}}</ref>
